modeSelection.description: Choose a mode for your dialogue. The app will guide you through the phases.

listening.name: Listening
listening.description: Focus on active listening and understanding

prep.breathe: Take a deep breath and center yourself before starting.
prep.center: Find a comfortable position and relax your shoulders.
prep.intention: Set a positive intention for this conversation.

transition.handover: Gently hand over the speaking space to your partner.
transition.listen: Now it's time to listen with your full attention.
transition.pause: Take a brief pause before the next person speaks.

cooldown.silence: Embrace the silence. No need to fill it with words.
cooldown.reflect: Take time to reflect on what was shared.
cooldown.gratitude: Express gratitude for your partner's openness.
cooldown.gentle: Be gentle with yourselves as you transition back.

builder.title: Create Session

timeline.empty: Drag a slot here or click

builder.needsSpeaker: At least one speaker slot required

home.subtitle: Dialogue for Couples
home.heroDescription: The Couple Timer guides you through structured dialogues following the proven method of Michael Lukas Moeller. Each partner gets to speak – without interruption, without discussion, without pressure.
home.whatIsP1: The Zwiegespräch ('dialogue between two') is a method by the German psychoanalyst Michael Lukas Moeller. It was developed to give couples a structure that makes genuine listening possible.
home.whatIsP2: The principle: Both speak in turn about themselves – not about the partner. No interruptions, no comments, no discussion. Just listening and being heard.
home.step1Desc: Both settle down. Breathe deeply. Set a positive intention.
home.step2Desc: A talks about everything on their mind – without censorship, without structure.
home.step3Desc: B listens actively – no comments, no questions, no reactions.
home.step4Desc: B shares what was going on inside. A now listens quietly.
home.step5Desc: Brief acknowledgment: Thank you for listening. No analysis, no judgment.
home.step6Desc: Silence. No follow-up discussion. Let the impressions settle.
home.balanceDesc: Both partners have exactly equal speaking time. Nobody dominates the conversation.
home.safetyDesc: The framework (timer, phases) provides safety. You don't have to worry about the process.
home.regularityDesc: Moeller recommended weekly dialogues – like a maintenance ritual for the relationship.
home.footerCredit: Based on the Zwiegespräch method by Michael Lukas Moeller

setup.namesHint: Names appear on the timer screen. Stored locally only.
setup.transitionDesc: Silent phase after each speaking time. Process before the next person speaks.
setup.noTransition: No transition – the next phase starts immediately.
setup.startHint: The gong starts immediately. Please prepare beforehand.

sessionPage.resumeDesc: An interrupted session was found. Do you want to continue?

completed.firstNote: You took time for each other – that counts.
completed.streakCongrats: 🎉 {{count}} days in a row! You are unstoppable!
completed.saved: The session has been saved to your streak.
